name: boost-pc-desktop
description: FPS Forge — Windows desktop app for FPS optimization and system tuning.
author: FPS Forge

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,el -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix client" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5175 && electron ."
scripts.dist: npm run license:bundle-url && npm run build:client && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win dir && node scripts/zip-win-unpacked.mjs
scripts.dist:portable: npm run license:bundle-url && npm run build:client && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win portable
scripts.dist:release: node scripts/ensure-license-url.mjs && node scripts/clean-release.mjs && npm run dist && node scripts/copy-release-artifact-local.mjs
scripts.dist:admin: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run dist --prefix admin-console
